ResourceVersionGenerator 1.0.23+864670a4e4
Copyright © SST Scheubeck GmbH 2025

  -c, --company           Required. Company name. Used to generate copyright
                          text. Default: null

  -o, --output            The output file. Default: '.\resourceVersion.h'

  -p, --product           Product name. Default: null

  -d, --description       Product description. Default: null

  --originalFilename      Original filename of the file you are writing the
                          version for. Default: null

  --forceVersionUpdate    Forces the execution of 'nbgv' even if valid
                          environment variables are available. Default: false

  -n, --nbgv              Use NBGV to process version

  --forceVersion          Force manual version (needs to be in 'a.b.c.d'
                          format). Default: null

  --verbose               Verbose console messages. Default: false

  -e, --encoding          Encoding codepage. Default: 65001 (UTF8).

  --emergencyVersion      If true, the version will be forced to
                          v1.0.0.0-emergency. Default: false

  -s, --silent            If true, all output will be suppressed, as long as
                          everything goes well. Default: false

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.
